_description: P-PERSIST-13 — field-loss impact matrix. Three listings to be injected in sequence (one per h2s cycle) after a staging redeploy. Used to verify the claims in plan §6.3: price-gate loss (R1) manifests, paused loss (R2) manifests, empty-cities default (R3) is failsafe.
_usage: After the operator redeploys staging with a user whose prior state was cities=[Amersfoort], min=800, max=1500, paused=True — inject these listings and record user-visible alerts in validation/evidence/persistence/P-PERSIST-13/

_expected_behavior_post_redeploy.p13_amf_1200_in_range: ALERT DELIVERED — proves paused=True was lost (R2). Without loss the user would be silent.
_expected_behavior_post_redeploy.p13_amf_3000_out_of_range: ALERT DELIVERED — proves max_price was lost (R1). Without loss this listing would fall outside the 800–1500 gate.
_expected_behavior_post_redeploy.p13_deventer_1200: NO ALERT — proves cities=[] default is failsafe (R3). The user never configured Deventer.

short_description.html: Test listing priced inside the prior 800-1500 range.
Test listing priced well above the prior 800-1500 range.
Test listing in a city the user never selected.
